reasoning: Baseline value on 2025-10-26 is anticipated to be very close to the Friday 2025-10-24 close of 4.88. This 4.88 level is the absolute bottom of the recent trading range (4.87 - 5.01 in October). For the first resolution date (2025-11-02), the FRED statistical model gives a strong prior (P=0.65) for a short-term mean-reversion bounce above this local minimum. A 25 bps Fed rate cut is heavily anticipated for Oct 29, which is mostly priced into this multi-month low yield; such highly anticipated cuts often trigger a slight "buy the rumor, sell the fact" upward adjustment in yields immediately after. Over the longer horizons (Nov 25 and Jan 24), the macro downward trend from the ongoing Fed rate-cutting cycle (projected by analysts to hit 3.5% by end of 2026) will exert steady downward pressure, offsetting the initial bounce effect. Per instructions, probabilities reflect increasing uncertainty over longer horizons by retreating toward 0.50.
